scope: policy ratification ONLY · no runtime mutation · no wrapper implementation · no x-front source change
boundary: P10C.10 converts the P10C.7 future-adoption decision into an enforceable contract of record. It does NOT implement wrappers, import x-front, modify v2/app.html, modify v2/src runtime, modify x-front source, or start Phase 10D.
ratification_effect: P10C.7 adoption decision stands. Phase 10D wrapper implementation is unblocked after Phase 10C signoff (P10C.13). All wrappers remain READ-ONLY references until Phase 10D begins.

required_before_implementation: Storybook wrapper states (image · initials · missing image · sizes · status states)
accessibility semantics (aria-label fallback chain · semantic img tag preserved)
design-token mapping at wrapper boundary (no x-front theme leak)
approved_future_wrappers.scope_constraint: team-identity surface ONLY (per P10C.4). Cross-surface use requires a new mapping decision.

required_before_implementation: alt text REQUIRED at wrapper boundary (a11y enforcement)
loading state · error state · empty state explicit
Storybook wrapper states (loading · loaded · error · empty · sizes)
approved_future_wrappers.scope_constraint: evidence-panel + media-preview surfaces (per P10C.4). Cross-surface use requires CTO sign-off.

required_before_implementation: supported preview types declared (image · pdf · video · doc · unsupported)
status model explicit (idle · loading · ready · error · unsupported)
Storybook wrapper states (per type × per status)
unit tests (component-level · all type × status combinations)
approved_future_wrappers.scope_constraint: evidence-panel + media-preview surfaces (per P10C.4). Cross-surface use requires CTO sign-off.

deferred_wrappers.blocker_detail: no role=dialog · no aria-modal · no focus trap · no portal (per P10C.5A · P10C.6 hard-gate fail)
deferred_wrappers.required_path: Build XDialog from @radix-ui/react-dialog OR an accessible re-implementation. The x-front Dialog is NOT the source. The wrapper does not import shared/uiKit/Dialog.

deferred_wrappers.blocker_detail: 2,524 LOC component family · explicit refactor-debt comments in upstream source
deferred_wrappers.required_path: Split into XLabel · XTextField · XSelect · XFieldList · XValidationMessage (5 separate wrappers · NOT one). Each must independently pass scorecard + maturity + R2 + license gates.

deferred_wrappers.blocker_detail: 3 feature imports (customCodeTestDrive · customCodeSetArguments · agentChat) + Redux dispatch/selector · product-fit weak per P10C.4 (P3 priority)
deferred_wrappers.required_path: Phase 11+ feature decoupling AND product-fit decision. If both resolve, a thin XCodeSidebar wrapper MAY be considered. Until both prerequisites resolve, no wrapper.

forbidden_patterns.description: Xlooop runtime UI MUST NOT import x-front components directly. All access to x-front-sourced components flows through Xlooop-owned X* wrappers in v2/src/ui/.
forbidden_patterns.enforcement: wrapper-boundary policy · enforced mechanically in Phase 10D when wrappers ship · pre-Phase-10D enforcement is documentary (this contract + ADR-0004 D2)

forbidden_patterns.description: MUI remains forbidden in v2 runtime. ADR-0004 D2 + UI Library Evaluation §3 reaffirm MUI is a x-front user-app dependency · NOT a Xlooop product foundation. Re-introduction requires a new ADR + this policy version bump.
Legacy demo assets (per P10C.4 inventory · 'demo-noise' tier) may NOT be routed to adoption. P10C.7 explicitly excluded all 78 remediation-routed components.
forbidden_patterns.enforcement: P10C.4 mapping invariants + scorecard threshold (≥75/100) + P10C.7 deferred-list invariant

forbidden_patterns.description: R2 Lane B (deferred) and Lane C (engine-internal) assets may NOT be adopted before R2 ratification by Ilmir. Lane A (R2-FREE) only may be considered.
forbidden_patterns.enforcement: P10C.5 R2 dependency audit + P10C.6 R2-independence hard gate + ADR-0004 D6

voiding_conditions: Phase 10C does not sign off cleanly at P10C.13
source_pin 8f62f6b no longer resolves at Phase 10D kickoff (re-pin required + re-ratification)
scorecard re-run drops any approved wrapper source below 75/100 normalized score
any approved wrapper source fails any of the 3 hard gates (accessibility · R2 independence · license risk) on re-verification
runtime implementation bypasses the Xlooop-owned wrapper contract (direct x-front import detected in v2/src/)
any forbidden_patterns rule is violated in v2 runtime
voiding_effect: If any voiding condition triggers: this policy is invalidated · P10C.7 adoption decision is voided · Phase 10D wrapper implementation is blocked until a fresh ratification cycle resolves the violation. P10C.9 intake-area decision still stands (it does not depend on wrapper ratification) but loses its immediate implementation purpose.
policy_revision_protocol: Adding a new approved wrapper requires: scorecard pass + contract-maturity pass + R2-clean + ADR amendment + policy_version bump
Promoting a deferred wrapper to approved requires: same as above + reason-resolution evidence
Removing the no-direct-import rule requires a new ADR + executive sign-off + replacement enforcement mechanism
Changing implementation_location from v2/src/ui/ requires a new ADR + this policy version bump

implementation_unblocked_after: this policy ratification (P10C.10 · this commit) is in effect
implementation_order_recommended: XAvatar first (lowest friction · cleanest scorecard · no CTO review gate)
XEvidencePreview third (CTO review at pre-merge · widest type matrix)
phase_10d_must_not: import x-front components directly into v2/src/ runtime
implement deferred wrappers without prior ratification cycle
skip CTO review for XEvidenceImage or XEvidencePreview

future_enforcement_placeholders.name: phase_10d_direct_xfront_import_check
future_enforcement_placeholders.description: Mechanical grep/AST gate that fails CI if v2/src/ contains a direct import from x-front (any path other than wrapper-internal references). NOT implemented in P10C.10 · scheduled for Phase 10D when wrappers ship and the enforcement target becomes meaningful.

next_routing.purpose: reusable skills (wrapper-policy-ratification · visual-baseline-recapture · component-scorecard-refresh · xfront-intake-audit) + Workflow §15 refinements
stack compatibility audit (defer upgrades · audit-only · no runtime mutation)

wrapper implementation under v2/src/ui/ (XAvatar · then XEvidenceImage with CTO review · then XEvidencePreview with CTO review) · only after P10C.13 signoff + this policy in effect + Phase 10D direct-import enforcement check landed
